entries.round: task:Rip out Sanity.io and replace it with MongoDB. 1. Use [TOOL_CALL: run_bash] to 'npm uninstall next-sanity @sanity/image-url @sanity/vision sanity' and 'npm install mongoose'. 2. Delete the 'sanity/' folder and 'src/app/studio'. 3. Create 'src/lib/mongodb.ts' to handle connection caching. 4. Create Mongoose models in 'src/models/Article.ts' and 'src/models/Category.ts'. 5. Create basic GET/POST API routes in 'src/app/api/articles/route.ts'. 6. Update 'src/app/page.tsx' to fetch articles via Mongoose instead of Sanity. Use <write_file> tags for new code.
